content.problemStatement:
You are given a tree with NNN nodes (numbered 111 through NNN). The tree is rooted at node rrr. For each node, find the number of walks with length KKK from the root to this node modulo 998244353998244353998244353.

A walk from node aaa to node bbb with length KKK is defined as a sequence of nodes (u1,u2,‚Ä¶,uK+1)(u_1, u_2, \dots, u_{K+1})(u1‚Äã,u2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,uK+1‚Äã), where u1=a,uK+1=bu_1 = a, u_{K+1} = bu1‚Äã=a,uK+1‚Äã=b and for each valid iii, there is an edge between nodes uiu_iui‚Äã and ui+1u_{i+1}ui+1‚Äã. Two walks (u1,u2,‚Ä¶,uK+1)(u_1, u_2, \dots, u_{K+1})(u1‚Äã,u2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,uK+1‚Äã) and (v1,v2,‚Ä¶,vK+1)(v_1, v_2, \dots, v_{K+1})(v1‚Äã,v2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,vK+1‚Äã) are considered different if there is a valid index iii such that ui‚âÝviu_i \neq v_iui‚ÄãÓÄÝ=vi‚Äã.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer NNN denoting the number of nodes in the tree.
Each of the next N‚àí1N-1N‚àí1 lines contains two space-separated integers xxx and yyy denoting an edge between nodes xxx and yyy.
The last line contains two space-separated integers rrr and KKK.
content.outputFormat: Print a single line containing NNN space-separated integers. For each valid iii, the iii-th of them should denote the number of walks from node rrr to node iii with length KKK, modulo 998244353998244353998244353.
